children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: The Secretary shall establish in the Department the position of Under Secretary of Agriculture for Rural Development.

children.heading: Confirmation required
children.label: b Confirmation required
children.text: The Under Secretary of Agriculture for Rural Development shall be appointed by the President, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate.

children.heading: Principal functions
children.label: 1 Principal functions
children.text: Upon establishment, the Secretary shall delegate to the Under Secretary of Agriculture for Rural Development those functions under the jurisdiction of the Department that are related to rural economic and community development.

children.heading: Additional functions
children.label: 2 Additional functions
children.text: The Under Secretary of Agriculture for Rural Development shall perform such other functions as may be required by law or prescribed by the Secretary.

children.heading: Succession
children.label: d Succession
children.text: Any official who is serving as Under Secretary of Agriculture for Small Community and Rural Development on , and who was appointed by the President, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate, shall not be required to be reappointed under subsection (b) to the successor position authorized under subsection (a) if the Secretary establishes the position, and the official occupies the new position, within 180 days after (or such later date set by the Secretary if litigation delays rapid succession).October 13, 1994October 13, 1994

children.heading: Loan approval authority
children.label: e Loan approval authority
children.text: Approval authority for loans and loan guarantees in connection with the electric and telephone loan and loan guarantee programs authorized by the Rural Electrification Act of 1936 ( et seq.) shall not be transferred to, or conditioned on review of, a State director or other employee whose primary duty is not the review and approval of such loans or the provision of assistance to such borrowers.7 U.S.C. 901
